narrative:
Meigs County has 14,218 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.7% of registrants.
